a3571b88-491b-5d93-b3ad-3e8c7da33081.title: dependent type languages
a3571b88-491b-5d93-b3ad-3e8c7da33081.html:
The followings are dependent type languages I try to create.

  • semi macro as type for dependent type theory work, by using local-expand and syntax-property
  • typical try macro as type and learn how to do termination check
  • incr inductive based on introduction/elimination rules
  • inductive try to build inductive language

72835038-0ffe-54ea-90a3-9e31169588ed.title: kubenet
72835038-0ffe-54ea-90a3-9e31169588ed.html: Tiny Kubernetes to show how its network work

4dad84ec-36a3-54ed-9f2f-c8679cfa7f1c.title: llir/llvm
4dad84ec-36a3-54ed-9f2f-c8679cfa7f1c.html:
Library for interacting with LLVM IR in pure Go. As a contributor, I majorly contribute to

  • 128-bits floating number
  • support of llvm 10.0/11.0
  • support of llvm 12.0(working)
  • document

cde1b053-b6ba-51d4-98d0-4ad395ffa6da.title: macro is not magic
cde1b053-b6ba-51d4-98d0-4ad395ffa6da.html: Present how macro work. The idea of macro is simple: a function operating AST. By operating AST, we can create new syntax for certain usage.
